rewritten_requirements: The system shall prevent calling the complete() method when the object is in the pending state.
The system shall execute wrap-up behavior in the finalizing state only after determining the approval status of the application.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The complete() method should not be called when the object is in the pending state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: calling the complete() method when the object is in the pending state wouldn’t make sense

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The finalizing state should perform wrap-up behavior only after knowing whether the application was approved.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: it would first have to know whether the application was approved—it wouldfirsthavetoknowwhethertheapplicationwasapproved.
